economic_notes: Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding. Construction in progress includes CMHC project ($584,800), roads and bridges ($299,000). Legal claims outstanding: Minty's Moving Ltd. $320,000, CIRB claim $400,000 with ~$150,000 exposure.
notes: Province is Manitoba (MB), not AB. Five entities fully consolidated: KFN Government, Education Authority, Health Program, Employment and Training, Housing Authority. No GBEs identified. OSR includes rental income ($304,579) and other revenue ($6,254,509). The large increase in expenses from 2023 ($12.9M) to 2024 ($19.0M) is notable, particularly in Band Administration (from $1.27M to $8.2M) and professional fees/supplies. Prior year surplus of $4.97M was unusually high. Outstanding legal claims total up to ~$860,000. Audit report dated September 24, 2025, which is unusual timing. No remuneration schedule included in provided text.
